events.notes: AAVE migration launched; 13M AAVE made available via 1:100 swap from legacy LEND token (100 LEND = 1 AAVE), effectively converting the existing circulating LEND supply.
3M AAVE allocated to the Aave Ecosystem Reserve at genesis to fund protocol development, grants, and governance incentives; not time-locked with a cliff but governed by Aave DAO.

Safety Module (SM) staking rewards began at genesis; emission rate set by governance (initially ~550 AAVE/day from Ecosystem Reserve), distributed continuously to stkAAVE holders — no single cliff date.
Liquidity Mining (LM) program for Aave V2 markets launched ~April 2021 via governance vote; AAVE and stkAAVE emitted continuously to depositors/borrowers from Ecosystem Reserve — no single cliff.
Aave Finance Committee (AFC) formed mid-2024 to manage treasury; ongoing DAO-controlled emissions from Ecosystem Reserve continue with no new cliff-based unlock events.

summary: AAVE does not follow a traditional VC/team vesting schedule with hard cliff-and-linear-release unlocks. The entire 16M token supply was effectively distributed at the October 2020 genesis: 13M via the LEND→AAVE migration (already circulating) and 3M into the DAO-controlled Ecosystem Reserve. There are no future scheduled large cliff unlocks; the only ongoing 'emission pressure' comes from continuous Safety Module staking rewards and governance-approved liquidity mining programs drawn from the Ecosystem Reserve, both of which are modest in rate and controlled by AAVE token holders.
caveats: 1) TokenUnlocks.app and CryptoRank.io free tiers show AAVE as having no upcoming scheduled cliff unlocks, consistent with the above, but their detailed historical breakdowns require paid access — so exact per-epoch emission totals are NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER. 2) Messari's free AAVE profile confirms the genesis allocation split but does not publish granular vesting tables for free. 3) Early LEND investor/team allocations (pre-2020) were governed by the original ETHLend token structure and are fully vested/converted; no documentation of those original lock periods remains easily accessible for free. 4) Exact daily/weekly AAVE emission rates from the Safety Module and LM programs vary by governance vote and are best tracked live on https://app.aave.com or Aave governance forum rather than a static unlock calendar.
